'''thavono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbitskin|rabbitskin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbitskin|rabbitskin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thavono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæveneth|thæveneth]] || [[word:thævenej|thævenej]] || [[word:thævenesh|thævenesh]] || [[word:thævene|thævene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thavovonoth|thavovonoth]] || [[word:thavovonoj|thavovonoj]] || [[word:thavovonosh|thavovonosh]] || [[word:thavovono|thavovono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavonoth|thavonoth]] || [[word:thavonoj|thavonoj]] || [[word:thavonosh|thavonosh]] || [[word:thavono|thavono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavofnoth|thavofnoth]] || [[word:thavofnoj|thavofnoj]] || [[word:thavofnosh|thavofnosh]] || [[word:thavofnof|thavofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thavonotho|thavonotho]] || [[word:thavonojo|thavonojo]] || [[word:thavonosho|thavonosho]] || [[word:thavonoko|thavonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thavonoth|thavonoth]] || [[word:thavonoj|thavonoj]] || [[word:thavonosh|thavonosh]] || [[word:thavono|thavono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thavonothol|thavonothol]] || [[word:thavonojol|thavonojol]] || [[word:thavonoshol|thavonoshol]] || [[word:thavonokol|thavonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thavonothotho|thavonothotho]] || [[word:thavonojojo|thavonojojo]] || [[word:thavonoshosho|thavonoshosho]] || [[word:thavonoko|thavonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thavonothon|thavonothon]] || [[word:thavonojon|thavonojon]] || [[word:thavonoshon|thavonoshon]] || [[word:thavonokon|thavonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thavonothoro|thavonothoro]] || [[word:thavonojoro|thavonojoro]] || [[word:thavonoshoro|thavonoshoro]] || [[word:thavonokoro|thavonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
